memories.h
Go to the documentation of this file.
1
18#ifndef MEDIA_C_MEMORIES_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_MEMORIES_H_
20
21#include <stddef.h>
22#include <stdint.h>
23
24#include "list.h"
25#include "memory.h"
26
27#ifdef __cplusplus
28extern "C" {
29#endif
30
41typedef list_t memories_t;
42
48static inline memories_t* memories_new(size_t size) { return list_new(size, sizeof(memory_t)); }
49
55static inline void memories_free(memories_t* memories, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
56 if (memories != NULL) {
57 list_free(memories, free_func);
58 }
59}
60
67static inline bool memories_add(memories_t* memories, memory_t* memory) { return list_add(memories, memory); }
68
75static inline memory_t* memories_get(const memories_t* memories, size_t index) {
76 return (memory_t*)list_get(memories, index);
77}
78
84static inline size_t memories_size(const memories_t* memories) { return memories->size; }
85
91static inline size_t memories_capacity(const memories_t* memories) { return memories->capacity; }
92
98static inline bool memories_empty(const memories_t* memories) { return memories->size == 0U; }
99
100#ifdef __cplusplus
101}
102#endif
103
104#endif // MEDIA_C_MEMORIES_H_

Generic dynamic array (list) container.
